company.name: Celcuity
company.subtitle: Gedatolisib NDA Priority Review · PDUFA Jul 17, 2026 · HR+/HER2- breast cancer

market.notes: VIKTORIA-1 PIK3CA WT: triplet PFS 9.3 vs 1.9 mo (HR=0.24), doublet 7.3 vs 1.9 mo. Published in JCO. Best Phase 3 PFS improvement ever in 2L+ HR+/HER2- breast cancer. NDA Priority Review PDUFA Jul 17, 2026. Licensed from Pfizer for $5M. Patent exclusivity to 2042.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~310K breast/yr; HR+/HER2- ~68% = ~210K incident, ~400K prevalent on-tx including adjuvant ET. Source: NCI SEER 2024.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~240K HR+/HER2- incident; ~450K prevalent on ET +/- CDK4/6. EUROCARE-6 + ESMO 2024 data.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~550K on-tx; China NCC + Japan NCR report HR+/HER2- ~70% of breast mix.

us.wtpPct.note: ~75% -- CDK4/6i (Ibrance/Verzenio/Kisqali) NCCN Cat 1 1L; Medicare Part D + commercial broad; adj Verzenio approved 2021.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~55% -- NICE + G-BA approved all 3 CDK4/6i; France ASMR III-IV; AI/fulvestrant generic baseline.

row.wtpPct.note: ~20% -- Japan J-DPC + China NRDL cover CDK4/6i; EM AI generics dominant (letrozole, anastrozole).

us.priceK.note: Blended $95K: CDK4/6i $160K (40% pts) + Trodelvy/Enhertu-low $180K (8%) + AI+fulvestrant $15K (40%) + Orserdu $220K (5%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$55K blended; EU net ~58% of US list; generic AI floor keeps blend low.

row.priceK.note: ~$20K blended; AI generics <$2K/yr dominate outside developed APAC.

penPct.note: ~58% peak -- CDK4/6i saturated 1L MBC; adj penetration growing 5yr; ESR1-mut Orserdu + ADCs expand late line.

us.reachPct.note: VIKTORIA-1 WT cohort 2L post-CDK4/6i; ~22-25K addressable US (HR+/HER2- 2L+ PIK3CA-WT post-CDK4/6i); 9% reach = ~22K. Specialty oncology call capacity caps early ramp.

us.priceK.note: $195K/yr est WAC anchored to capivasertib (Truqap $17K/mo) + fulvestrant; Celcuity PAP + copay card expected at launch; no precedent for pan-PI3K/mTOR oral+inj combo.

us.wtpPct.note: ~55% -- NCCN listing expected post-PDUFA 2026; commercial + Medicare Part B infused triplet; novel mechanism vs generic fulvestrant baseline limits initial uptake.

eu.reachPct.note: ~25% EU5 reach; EMA filing ~2027 post-VIKTORIA-1 OS; NICE likely to restrict to post-CDK4/6i 2L similar to Truqap TA905.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~30% -- G-BA Zusatznutzen unclear given elacestrant/capivasertib comparator; France HAS likely ASMR IV.

eu.priceK.note: ~$115K blended; ~60% US net; fulvestrant generic floors baseline.

row.reachPct.note: <10% ROW; Japan PMDA filing post-US; China via partner TBD; ex-Japan APAC minimal.

row.wtpPct.note: ~12% -- Japan only mature market for novel breast orals post-launch; China NRDL uncertain for triplet.

row.priceK.note: ~$35K blended; Japan parity $140K, rest China/APAC post-VBP pricing.

market.notes: VIKTORIA-1 PIK3CA mutant cohort vs Piqray (alpelisib). Topline Q2 2026 — second major catalyst. Piqray mPFS 7.3mo in Bylieve. Phase 1 gedatolisib: 19.7mo mPFS in PIK3CA-mutant. If confirmed in Phase 3: gedatolisib displaces Piqray entirely.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~310K breast/yr; HR+/HER2- ~68% = ~210K incident, ~400K prevalent on-tx including adjuvant ET. Source: NCI SEER 2024.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~240K HR+/HER2- incident; ~450K prevalent on ET +/- CDK4/6. EUROCARE-6 + ESMO 2024 data.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~550K on-tx; China NCC + Japan NCR report HR+/HER2- ~70% of breast mix.

us.wtpPct.note: ~75% -- CDK4/6i (Ibrance/Verzenio/Kisqali) NCCN Cat 1 1L; Medicare Part D + commercial broad; adj Verzenio approved 2021.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~55% -- NICE + G-BA approved all 3 CDK4/6i; France ASMR III-IV; AI/fulvestrant generic baseline.

row.wtpPct.note: ~20% -- Japan J-DPC + China NRDL cover CDK4/6i; EM AI generics dominant (letrozole, anastrozole).

us.priceK.note: Blended $95K: CDK4/6i $160K (40% pts) + Trodelvy/Enhertu-low $180K (8%) + AI+fulvestrant $15K (40%) + Orserdu $220K (5%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$55K blended; EU net ~58% of US list; generic AI floor keeps blend low.

row.priceK.note: ~$20K blended; AI generics <$2K/yr dominate outside developed APAC.

penPct.note: ~58% peak -- CDK4/6i saturated 1L MBC; adj penetration growing 5yr; ESR1-mut Orserdu + ADCs expand late line.

us.reachPct.note: PIK3CA-mutant 2L HR+ MBC ~22K/yr addressable (40% of post-CDK4/6i pool); directly competes with Truqap (AZN) + Piqray (NVS) -- ~35% share at peak.

us.priceK.note: $205K/yr blended WAC; premium to Piqray $16K/mo x 13mo = $208K for better TEAE profile per VIKTORIA-1 run-in.

us.wtpPct.note: ~65% -- PIK3CA-mut companion dx reimbursed, NCCN Cat 2A precedent via Piqray; Medicare Part B + commercial full for infused alpelisib-class.

eu.reachPct.note: ~30% EU5 reach PIK3CA-mut; EMA mutation-selected label precedent from Piqray 2020; HTA access via specialist oncology.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~38% -- NICE TA886 approved Piqray 2023; G-BA betraechtlich precedent favors PIK3CA-mut access.

eu.priceK.note: ~$120K blended; ~58% of US; biomarker-selected premium over non-selected WT.

row.reachPct.note: ~12% ROW; PIK3CA-mut testing rates limit reach ex-Japan; China NGS adoption growing post-2024 NRDL.

row.wtpPct.note: ~15% -- Japan PMDA Piqray precedent; China NRDL biomarker drugs increasingly covered.

market.notes: VIKTORIA-2: gedatolisib + CDK4/6i + fulvestrant as 1L treatment. If 2L is approved, 1L is the massive TAM expansion. Enrolling.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~310K breast/yr; HR+/HER2- ~68% = ~210K incident, ~400K prevalent on-tx including adjuvant ET. Source: NCI SEER 2024.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~240K HR+/HER2- incident; ~450K prevalent on ET +/- CDK4/6. EUROCARE-6 + ESMO 2024 data.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~550K on-tx; China NCC + Japan NCR report HR+/HER2- ~70% of breast mix.

us.wtpPct.note: ~75% -- CDK4/6i (Ibrance/Verzenio/Kisqali) NCCN Cat 1 1L; Medicare Part D + commercial broad; adj Verzenio approved 2021.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~55% -- NICE + G-BA approved all 3 CDK4/6i; France ASMR III-IV; AI/fulvestrant generic baseline.

row.wtpPct.note: ~20% -- Japan J-DPC + China NRDL cover CDK4/6i; EM AI generics dominant (letrozole, anastrozole).

us.priceK.note: Blended $95K: CDK4/6i $160K (40% pts) + Trodelvy/Enhertu-low $180K (8%) + AI+fulvestrant $15K (40%) + Orserdu $220K (5%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$55K blended; EU net ~58% of US list; generic AI floor keeps blend low.

row.priceK.note: ~$20K blended; AI generics <$2K/yr dominate outside developed APAC.

penPct.note: ~58% peak -- CDK4/6i saturated 1L MBC; adj penetration growing 5yr; ESR1-mut Orserdu + ADCs expand late line.

us.reachPct.note: VIKTORIA-2 1L HR+/HER2- MBC triplet vs CDK4/6i+ET SOC; huge ~210K prevalent pool but entrenched CDK4/6i franchise ($15B) limits near-term share to 15-20%.

us.priceK.note: $220K/yr triplet; must price above CDK4/6i ($175K) to justify combination value; PAP + bridge program expected.

us.wtpPct.note: ~50% -- must displace Kisqali/Verzenio OS-positive 1L SOC; P3 OS readout 2027 gates broad NCCN 1L; early adopters academic only.

eu.reachPct.note: ~15% EU5 1L reach; displacing CDK4/6i 1L SOC very difficult -- NICE/G-BA unlikely to endorse vs generic entering 2028.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~22% -- EU payors skeptical of triplets absent OS; CDK4/6i biosim/generic pressure from 2028.

eu.priceK.note: ~$130K triplet blended; EU HTA discounts ~60% of US.

row.reachPct.note: <8% ROW 1L; Japan only; EM CDK4/6i biosim dominance.

row.wtpPct.note: ~10% -- Japan J-DPC covers 1L triplets post-PMDA; China 1L CDK4/6i NRDL entrenched.

market.notes: Gedatolisib + darolutamide in mCRPC. PAM pathway activated in prostate cancer. Early stage — option value.

us.patientsK.note: SEER: ~300K new prostate/yr; ~55K mCSPC + ~45K mCRPC on systemic tx. Source: NCI SEER 2024, PCF.

eu.patientsK.note: EU5 ~345K new prostate/yr; ~110K on ARPi/chemo/PARPi per EUROCARE.

row.patientsK.note: ROW ~200K on-tx; Japan high incidence post-PSA screening expansion.

us.wtpPct.note: ~70% -- ARPi (Xtandi/Erleada/Nubeqa) mCSPC SOC; Medicare Part D + VA cover; 340B strong at academic.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~52% -- NICE + G-BA approved all ARPi; France ASMR III; ADT generic baseline.

row.wtpPct.note: ~18% -- Japan full reimb, China NRDL enza/apa; EM use ADT + docetaxel.

us.priceK.note: Blended $95K: ARPi $180K (45% pts) + Pluvicto $240K (8%) + Lynparza/Talzenna $175K (7%) + ADT+chemo $25K (40%).

eu.priceK.note: ~$55K blended; EU net ~58% US; ADT leuprolide generic <$3K/yr.

penPct.note: ~60% peak -- ARPi intensification 1L mCSPC reached 75% eligible; Pluvicto + PARPi (HRR+) extend 5yr.

us.reachPct.note: CELC-G-201 mCRPC PI3K-altered post-ARPi cohort ~15K US; early Ph1b data 2025; targets PTEN-loss/PIK3CA-mut ~25-30% of mCRPC genomically.

us.priceK.note: ~$195K/yr projected; anchored to Pluvicto $42K/dose x 6 + Xtandi $13K/mo context.

us.wtpPct.note: ~40% est launch WTP ~2028; NCCN mCRPC PI3K-altered slot open post-Ipatasertib failure; Medicare Part B infused.

eu.reachPct.note: ~18% EU5; EMA filing gated on Ph3 mCRPC 2028+; NICE precedent from capivasertib prostate TBD.

eu.wtpPct.note: ~22% estimate; EU PI3K-prostate comparator limited; biomarker testing uptake growing via GAP registry.

row.reachPct.note: <8% ROW; Japan PMDA post-US ~1yr lag; China NGS mCRPC testing <20%.

row.wtpPct.note: ~10% -- Japan only; China NRDL targeted mCRPC early.

mega_bear.narrative: FDA rejects gedatolisib — safety or open-label design concern
events: ✗ FDA issues CRL — concerns about open-label VIKTORIA-1 design
✗ PIK3CA mutant cohort disappoints vs Piqray
✗ Single-asset company with no backup
→ Stock collapses to $15-20 (cash floor ~$12/share)

bear.narrative: Approved but narrow WT label + mutant misses Piqray bar
events: ✓ PIK3CA WT approved — but niche 2L+ population
✗ PIK3CA mutant cohort borderline vs Piqray — no label expansion
~ Slow physician adoption — open-label trial skepticism
→ Peak $500M limited to WT post-CDK4/6i patients

base.narrative: WT approved Jul 2026 + mutant cohort positive → broad 2L breast cancer label
events: ✓ PIK3CA WT approved Jul 2026 — new 2L standard of care
✓ PIK3CA mutant cohort beats Piqray — label expansion filed
✓ Gedatolisib becomes pan-PI3K standard across WT + mutant
~ VIKTORIA-2 1L enrolling, prostate early

bull.narrative: Pan-PI3K/mTOR franchise across breast cancer + prostate — $3B+ peak
events: ✓ WT + mutant both approved — all 2L+ HR+/HER2- breast cancer
✓ VIKTORIA-2 1L positive — doubles addressable market
✓ CELsignia diagnostic platform adds precision medicine angle
✓ Prostate cancer expands TAM further — multi-tumor franchise

psychedelic_bull.narrative: Gedatolisib replaces all PI3K inhibitors globally — Pfizer/Roche acquires at $300+
events: ✓ Pan-PI3K/mTOR standard of care across all breast cancer lines
✓ mCRPC data strong — $5B+ multi-tumor franchise
✓ CELsignia becomes companion diagnostic standard
✓ Pfizer or Roche acquires for $10-15B (they licensed it to Celcuity for $5M!)

lastData.title: NDA Priority Review PDUFA Jul 17 + PIK3CA WT PFS 16.6 vs 1.9mo in subgroup
points: NDA accepted with Priority Review — PDUFA Jul 17, 2026
PIK3CA WT triplet: PFS 9.3 vs 1.9 mo (HR=0.24) overall
Subgroup with longer prior TTP: PFS 16.6 vs 1.9 mo (HR=0.14)
Published in Journal of Clinical Oncology (peer-reviewed)
PIK3CA mutant cohort topline expected Q2 2026

nextCatalyst.title: PIK3CA mutant topline (Q2) + PDUFA (Jul 17)
thresholds: PIK3CA mutant cohort: gedatolisib vs Piqray (alpelisib) — key for full label
Jul 17 PDUFA: FDA approval/CRL for PIK3CA WT
If both positive: gedatolisib covers ALL 2L+ HR+/HER2- breast cancer

risks: VIKTORIA-1 was open-label — FDA may have concerns about bias
Stock up 10x in 12 months — enormous expectations priced in
Single-asset company — everything depends on gedatolisib
PIK3CA mutant cohort must beat Piqray to justify full thesis
No commercial infrastructure — needs to build or partner
$4.3B market cap for a pre-revenue company — expensive even with Priority Review
Breast cancer 2L+ is competitive (inavolisib approved, capivasertib approved)
Patent exclusivity strong (2042) but commercial execution unproven

catalysts.title: VIKTORIA-1 PIK3CA mutant cohort topline data
catalysts._rationale: PIK3CA mutant cohort fully enrolled, topline data expected late Q1/Q2 2026

catalysts.title: Gedatolisib PDUFA decision for PIK3CA wild-type
catalysts._rationale: FDA assigned PDUFA goal date of July 17, 2026 with Priority Review
